name: Rockworth Public Company Limited
summary: Rockworth Public Company Limited manufactures, distributes, and markets office systems furniture in Thailand and rest of Asia. Its products include de-mountable, interior wall, and full height storage systems; workstations; tables and training systems; executive systems; and filing and storage systems. The company also provides lighting products and mounted accessories, as well as seating and lounges products, including chairs, sofas, and seating products. It serves clients in automobile, consumer product, educational institution, financial institution, insurance, government, real estate and property, logistic, petrochemical, media, telecommunication, and others markets through a network of dealers. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
